leads.name: Aman Gupta
leads.notes: Co-founder & CMO. boAt is India's #1 audio brand with $1.5B+ valuation. Estimated 500+ support tickets/day. Recently expanded to smartwatches. High volume of warranty claims and returns. Uses Freshdesk. Looking to scale support without hiring more agents.

leads.name: Varun Alagh
leads.notes: Co-founder & CEO. Mamaearth is leading D2C beauty brand, $1.2B+ valuation. 400+ daily support tickets. Product ingredient questions, delivery issues, returns. Strong focus on customer trust. Listed on stock exchange - needs efficient support for investor relations too.

leads.name: Harshil Mathur
leads.notes: Co-founder & CEO. Razorpay is India's leading payment gateway, $7.5B+ valuation. 8M+ merchants. Complex B2B support needs - payment failures, refunds, merchant onboarding. High-value customer support crucial for fintech trust. 24/7 support needed.

leads.name: Aadit Palicha
leads.notes: Co-founder & CEO. Zepto is quick commerce unicorn, $5B+ valuation. 10-minute delivery model = high support volume. Missing items, delivery delays, refunds. 2000+ daily tickets. 24/7 operations. Rapid city expansion creating support chaos.

leads.name: Abhiraj Singh Bhal
leads.notes: Co-founder. Urban Company is home services unicorn. Service quality complaints, booking issues, partner coordination. 600+ daily tickets. Multi-city operations. Complex support needs - both customer and service partner support required.

_schema.name: contact name
_schema.notes: detailed research notes for LLM personalization
